summary: A cinematic, color-graded (teal-and-amber, letterboxed, lens-flared) montage set to music: a presidential motorcade glides past the Washington Monument at golden hour, then cuts to blue-collar construction crews (hard hats, an 'MID-AMERICA' trailer marked Atoka, OK) lined up to meet Trump, who walks the line in a long coat and poses with the workers giving thumbs-up, ending on a black title card. Though the tweet frames it as 'Restoring the Reflecting Pool / Making D.C. beautiful again,' the video is a stylized hero-of-American-labor/infrastructure spectacle, not a documentary of pool repair. The slick film-grade grading, anamorphic widescreen, and music bed make it a clear youth-appeal produced piece glorifying Trump and American workers.

script.scene: Wide cinematic shot, teal/amber color grade and lens flare: a black SUV presidential motorcade rolls across an open plaza with the Washington Monument behind it at golden hour. Music-driven, no speech.
Cut to a moodily-lit lineup of bearded construction/labor workers in hard hats and work shirts (caps, an 'America'-branded banner behind), standing shoulder to shoulder facing camera.

Low-angle shot of a figure in a dark long coat and suit (Trump) standing before the line of workers; their dusty boots and jeans fill the frame beside a black Cadillac SUV. Dramatic, dim cinematic tone.
Group hero shot in front of a 'MID-AMERICA / Atoka, OK' equipment trailer: Trump in red tie and dark coat stands centered, surrounded by the work crew giving thumbs-up and smiling for the camera.
Black end title card with faint text (e.g. 'President Donald...'), closing the montage.

notable_text: Tweet: 'Restoring the Reflecting Pool. Making D.C. beautiful again!'
